# Agentforce Developer Guide - Content Extraction

## Page Title & Main Topic
"Get Started with Agentforce and AI Agents" - A comprehensive developer resource for deploying AI agents on the Salesforce Platform.

## Core Description
Agentforce is described as "the agent-driven layer of the Salesforce Platform" that enables deployment of AI agents working alongside employees to extend workforce capabilities and provide 24/7 customer service. The platform includes a "Trust Layer" for securely connecting data with large language models.

## Overview Guides
- **Agentforce APIs and SDKs** - Resources for building solutions using various APIs and software development kits
- **Agentforce Actions** - Guidelines for constructing and improving Agentforce actions

## Development Tools
- **Agent Script** - Language for building agents in Agentforce Builder
- **Agentforce DX** - Pro-code tools for Salesforce CLI and VS Code integration
- **Prompt Builder** - Features for creating, managing, and using prompt templates

## Models and Prompts
Guidance for configuring and utilizing large language models, including Prompt Builder features.

## External Resources
- Salesforce Help articles on Agentforce and Generative AI
- Salesforce Help articles on Agentforce Agents

## Last Fetched
2026-04-06 - No changes detected from previous fetch.
